name: discover_tools
desc: Search for MCP action tools by describing your objective. Returns tool names and descriptions. Call execute_tool(tool_name, params_json) to use any returned tool. Example: discover_tools('check clashes') returns check_clashes, navigate_to_clash etc.

parameters.name: objective
parameters.description: Describe what you need to do — e.g. 'check for clashes between elements' or 'export drawings to PDF'
